title: Getting Started with GitHub Copilot
description: Learn the fundamentals of GitHub Copilot and how it can accelerate your development workflow. We'll cover setup, best practices, and real-world examples of AI-assisted coding.

title: Building Intelligent Apps with Azure OpenAI
description: Discover how to integrate Azure OpenAI Service into your applications to create intelligent, AI-powered experiences. This advanced session covers API usage, prompt engineering, and deployment strategies.

title: Security Essentials for Modern Applications
description: An introductory overview of essential security practices for modern application development. Topics include secure authentication, data protection, and compliance fundamentals.

title: Advanced Copilot Patterns for Enterprise Teams
description: Deep dive into enterprise-scale GitHub Copilot deployment and customization. Learn about policy management, telemetry, and optimizing Copilot for your organization's specific needs.
